["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"CocoaPods 是一个 Cocoa 和 Cocoa Touch 框架的依赖管理器，具体原理和 Homebrew 有点类似，都是从 GitHub 下载索引，然后根据索引下载依赖的源代码。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"对于旧版的 CocoaPods 可以使用如下方法使用镜像："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新版的 CocoaPods 不允许用",["$r","code",null,{"children":"pod repo add"}],"直接添加 master 库了，但是依然可以："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["最后进入自己的工程，在自己工程的",["$r","code",null,{"children":"podFile"}],"第一行加上："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2"}]]}]
